problem id: af5e4060
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  01010010 -> 10011010
  10011111 -> 11111111
  11110100 -> 10111111
  11111001 -> 11011111
  11111010 -> 11011111
  01100100 -> 00101111
  01011110 -> 11111011
  10011100 -> 11110111

query: 00111001
predicted answer: 11001111
